MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-16-2014 IN 206, DEFENDANTS DEREK TAGGARD AND SUTTER MEDICAL GROUP'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS DENIED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 11/3/14 REMAINS. SINCE PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY COULD NOT CONFIRM WITH HIS EXPERTS AT THE TIME OF THE HEARING THAT A ONE WEEK CONTINUANCE IS ACCEPTABLE IN TERMS OF THEIR SCHEDULE, THE COURT DENIED DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL. THE COURT STATED THAT IT MAY TRAIL THE CASE FOR A WEEK AT TRIAL CALL TO ACCOMMODATE DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR A TRIAL CONTINUANCE. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M.
